commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the patch is reviewable as-is and the remaining action is normal maintainer merge after required checks.; Cleared: The security pass found no concrete regression; the diff removes Cloudflare credential env vars from local dependency checks and does not add dependencies or broaden workflow permissions. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Cloudflare Dynamic Workers CLI/client and Worker deployment path to default compatibility identity, retry transient GET reads, build the bundle in CI, and harden the live smoke harness credential/config handling.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence local reproduction was run against Cloudflare, but the source path is clear: current main lacks the GET retry/default compatibility handling that the PR adds, and the PR includes focused regression tests plus reported live smoke output.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the patch is reviewable as-is and the remaining action is normal maintainer merge after required checks.

target.title: fix: harden Cloudflare Dynamic Workers lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary

- follow up the landed Cloudflare Dynamic Workers provider from https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/287
- make claim deletion race-safe and stabilize transient Cloudflare lifecycle reads
- pin compatibility identity, require the Worker-to-Worker fetch compatibility flag, and validate the Dynamic Workers bundle in CI
- keep live smoke configuration outside the checkout and scrub Cloudflare credentials from dependency checks

## Verification

- `go vet ./...`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `npm run format:check --prefix worker`
- `npm run lint --prefix worker`
- `npm run check --prefix worker`
- `npm test --prefix worker` (566 tests)
- `npm run build --prefix worker`
- `npm run build:cloudflare-dynamic-workers --prefix worker`
- `npm run build:node --prefix worker`
- `node --test scripts/*.test.js` (201 tests)
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `CRABBOX_LIVE=1 CRABBOX_LIVE_PROVIDERS=cloudflare-dynamic-workers CRABBOX_CFDW_SKIP_LOCAL_CHECKS=1 scripts/deploy-cloudflare-dynamic-workers-smoke.sh`
  - deployed an ephemeral loader and KV namespace
  - observed `CRABBOX_CFDW_OK`
  - observed `CRABBOX_CFDW_EGRESS_BLOCKED`
  - status, refreshed list, stop, and cleanup passed
  - final classification: `live_cloudflare_dynamic_workers_smoke_passed`
  - teardown confirmed the Worker no longer exists and the KV namespace is absent
- autoreview: clean, no accepted or actionable findings
target.author: steipete
